tests.purpose: Consistent Celsius/Kelvin records should not be flagged as conflicts.
tests.inputCase: toy water boiling point appears as 100 C and 373.15 K

tests.purpose: Suspicious acetone toy record should be flagged.
tests.inputCase: toy acetone boiling point appears as 999 C

tests.purpose: Unknown identifier should be low confidence rather than silently canonicalized.
tests.inputCase: toy molecule record has an unknown identifier

tests.purpose: Malformed unit should be rejected or flagged.
tests.inputCase: toy record uses unsupported temperature unit text
